# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent message queue security.
# Category: message_queue_security

server:
  jmx:
    enabled: true
    port: 9999
    allow-hostname-wildcard: true

listeners:
  - PLAINTEXT://:9092

advertised.listeners:
- PLAINTEXT://<kafka-broker>:9092

security.inter.broker.protocol:
  ssl.enabled.protocols: TLSv1.2,TLSv1.3
  ssl.keystore.location: /path/to/keystore.jks
  ssl.keystore.password: <keystore-password>
  ssl.truststore.location: /path/to/truststore.jks
  ssl.truststore.password: <truststore-password>

inter.broker.protocol.version: SSL

listeners.SSL://<kafka-broker>:9093

advertised.listeners.SSL:
- SSL://<kafka-broker>:9093

security.inter.broker.protocol.ssl.enabled.protocols: TLSv1.2,TLSv1.3
security.inter.broker.protocol.ssl.keystore.location: /path/to/keystore.jks
security.inter.broker.protocol.ssl.keystore.password: <keystore-password>
security.inter.broker.protocol.ssl.truststore.location: /path/to/truststore.jks
security.inter.broker.protocol.ssl.truststore.password: <truststore-password>

ssl.client.auth: none

JMX_PORT: 9999
